nasb.text: The sky was split apart like a scroll when it is rolled up, and every mountain and island were moved out of their places.

esv.text: The sky vanished like a scroll that is being rolled up, and every mountain and island was removed from its place.

cnv.text: 天隱退了，像書被捲起來一樣；山嶺和海島都從原處移去了。

ccb.text: 天空也像书卷被卷起来，所有的山岭和海岛都被挪离原位。

csbs.text: 天被劈裂，好像书卷被卷起来；一切山岭和海岛也都从原处被挪开了。
